summary: Code profile preserves UPPER_SNAKE constants and numeric '401'
Formal profile keeps Rule 12(b)(6) literal punctuation + Latin terms
Recording resolves the live input device, not the launch-time one
Spanish locale forces non-.en model; accents and '+' brand survive
Full record→transcribe loop leaks zero network egress; whisper artifacts stripped
Accessibility silently revoked; Murmur must detect within 200ms and surface a banner
Fresh DMG install on a clean account reaches a working menubar agent
History DB stores raw+cleaned+timestamp+bundle id and is FTS-indexed
